'''âj-k-r-n''' ('''kajakrenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flight|flight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flight|flight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-k-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kajakrenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijakrenoko|thijakrenoko]] || [[word:jijakrenoko|jijakrenoko]] || [[word:shijakrenoko|shijakrenoko]] || [[word:kijakrenoko|kijakrenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujakrenoko|thuthujakrenoko]] || [[word:jujujakrenoko|jujujakrenoko]] || [[word:shushujakrenoko|shushujakrenoko]] || [[word:kukujakrenoko|kukujakrenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujakrenoko|thujakrenoko]] || [[word:jujakrenoko|jujakrenoko]] || [[word:shujakrenoko|shujakrenoko]] || [[word:kujakrenoko|kujakrenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojakrenoko|thojakrenoko]] || [[word:jojakrenoko|jojakrenoko]] || [[word:shojakrenoko|shojakrenoko]] || [[word:kojakrenoko|kojakrenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojakrenoko|thojakrenoko]] || [[word:jojakrenoko|jojakrenoko]] || [[word:shojakrenoko|shojakrenoko]] || [[word:kojakrenoko|kojakrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjakrenoko|thĂŠjakrenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjakrenoko|jĂŠjakrenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjakrenoko|shĂŠjakrenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjakrenoko|kĂŠjakrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajakrenoko|thathajakrenoko]] || [[word:jajajakrenoko|jajajakrenoko]] || [[word:shashajakrenoko|shashajakrenoko]] || [[word:kakajakrenoko|kakajakrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajakrenoko|thajakrenoko]] || [[word:jajakrenoko|jajakrenoko]] || [[word:shajakrenoko|shajakrenoko]] || [[word:kajakrenoko|kajakrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajakrenoko|thajakrenoko]] || [[word:jajakrenoko|jajakrenoko]] || [[word:shajakrenoko|shajakrenoko]] || [[word:kajakrenoko|kajakrenoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
